MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY NGUYEN, SYLVIE X.V. TAD NGUYEN AS TO DEFENDANT ENG, JORDAN RYAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-31-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ENG, JORDAN RYAN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT NGUYEN, SYLVIE X.V.
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT, ADD SECOND PLTF. TAD NGUYEN.
PARTIES NOTIFIED BY PHONE RE CONTINUANCE DATE.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-08-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-08-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTED.(506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAD NGUYEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENG, JORDAN RYAN $5,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,690.00, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF TAD NGUYEN'S DAMAGES TO BE $7000, AND ATTRIBUTES 20% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO THE OPERATOR OF PLAINTIFF'S CAR. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED BY AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES TO SUBSTITUTE TAD NGUYEN AS A PLAINTIFF IN PLACE OF SYLVIE NGUYEN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
